titleStmt.title: SII 8.338: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 338. (A.R. No. 63 of 1903). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tribhuvanaccakravarttikaḷ śrīrācarācatevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 9 tulānāyiṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu prathamaiyum cevvāykkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa coti nāḷ teṉkarai pāṇṭikulācaṉivaḷanāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruvāṉaikkāvuṭaiya
nāyaṉār koyil Āticaṇṭeśvaratevakaṉmikaḷukku vaṭakarai rācarācavaḷanāṭṭup pācciṟkūṟṟattuk kiḻpalāṟṟuk kuṟaippaṟṟu Icaṇaikkuṟai Ūravarom puṉcey nila vilaiypiramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭuk kuṭutta paricāvatu . Icaṇai
kkuṟait talaikkuṟaiyil nāṅkaḷ viṟkiṉṟa nilaṅkaḷukku Icainta nāṟpāṟkellai malaiyāḷaril kotaiyk koṇṭanampiceṭṭiyār nilattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai ciṟṟāṟṟu niroṭukālukku vaṭakkum mipāṟkellai
kaṭampaṅkuṭaiyāṉ Iniyāṉ peṟṟāṉ nilattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai vaṭavāṟṟu niroṭukālukkut teṟkum Āka Icainta Innāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa taṭi nālināl 1 + 1/4 + 1/40 Iṉṉilam Oṉṟekāle Araimāvum Iṅkuvi
ṭṭu mitupoy pūvaṇamuṭaiyāṉ taṭinilattukku Icainta vaṭapāṟkellai koṇṭanampiceṭṭiyār nilattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai ciṟṟāṟṟu niroṭukālukku vaṭakkum mipāṟkellai meṉāṭṭarayaṉ ṉilattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭa
pāṟkellai vaṭavāṟṟu niroṭukālukkut teṟkum Āka Icainta Iṉṉāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa 4 + 1/20 Iṉṉilam nālumāk kāṇiyum Iṅkuviṭṭu mitupoy Amaṇkuṭaiyāṉ taṭinilattukkum cūraikkuṭai
yāṉ taṭi nilattukkum kiḷiyaṉ tuṇaivaṉ taṭi nilattukkum Icainta kiḻpāṟkellai kaḻaṉivāyaluṭaiyāṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār nilattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai ciṟṟāṟṟu niroṭukālukku vaṭakkum mipāṟkellai koṇṭanampiceṭ
ṭiyār nilattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai vaṭavāṟṟu niroṭukālukku teṟkum Āka Icainta Innāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa taṭi muṉṟiṉāl 1 + 1/20 + 3/80 + 1/160 Innilam Oṉṟe Orumā mukkāṇi Araikkāṇiyum Iṅkuviṭṭu mitupoy
kalattuṟai mukkālukku Icainta kiḻpāṟkellai Āḻvārc cāttaṅkuṭaiyār Arintavaṉ viḻupparaiyar nilattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai ciṟṟāṟṟu niroṭukālukku vaṭakkum mipāṟkellai kaḻaṉivāyaluṭaiyāṉ Uḷḷiṭṭaār nilat
tukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai vaṭavāṟṟu niroṭukaālukku teṟkum Āka Icainta Iṉṉāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa 1/2 + 1/40 Innilam Araiye Araimāvum Ākat taṭi Oṉpatiṉāl 3 + 2 + 1/20 + 1/160 Iṉṉilam muṉṟe Iraṇṭumā Araikkā
ṇiyum Iṟṟaināḷāl viṟṟukkuṭuttukoḷvatāṉa Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭu naṟkācu 6 1000 2 100 10 3 Ikkācu Āṟāyirattu Irunūṟṟorupattumuṉṟum Āvaṇakkaḷariye kāṭṭeṟṟik kaiccelavaṟakkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilai
pramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭuk kuṭuttom Āticaṇṭeśvaratevar kaṉmikaḷukku Icaṇaikkuṟai Ūravarom . Innilam muṉṟeiraṇṭumā Araikkāṇikkum Ikkācu Āṟāyirat tirunūṟ ṟorupattumuṉṟume vilaiyāvatākavum . Ituve
The inscription is built in after this.
Digital edition of SII 8.338 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
